title: Fedtschenkiella kafiristanica
taxonomy: Fedtschenkiella kafiristanica is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Fedtschenkiella, which is a group of small, annual plants. The genus Fedtschenkiella is part of the family Caryophyllaceae, commonly known as the pink or carnation family. The plant is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. As a member of the Caryophyllaceae family, Fedtschenkiella kafiristanica shares characteristics with other plants in this family, such as delicate flowers and small, grass-like leaves.
